testcase.name: rejects invalid credentials
testcase.failure: AssertionError: Expected 401 but got 200 at Object.<anonymous> (tests/unit/auth.spec.ts:25:5) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)

testcase.name: handles timeout
testcase.error: TimeoutError: Connection timeout after 5000ms at Timeout._onTimeout (tests/unit/auth.spec.ts:40:11)

testcase.name: validates input schema
testcase.failure: Expected object to match schema but got validation errors: - "email" must be a valid email - "age" must be a positive number
